prediction_rule: Repeated disk I/O errors indicate possible disk or controller failure.
root_cause: Possible disk failure, bad sectors, or storage controller issue.
suggested_action: Check SMART status, run disk diagnostics, verify controller logs, and replace disk if required.

prediction_rule: ECC correction threshold exceeded on memory module.
root_cause: Faulty RAM module or memory slot instability.
suggested_action: Run memory diagnostics, reseat DIMM, and replace affected RAM module.

prediction_rule: CPU temperature is above warning threshold.
root_cause: Cooling issue, blocked airflow, fan failure, or degraded thermal paste.
suggested_action: Check fans, airflow, heat sink, and thermal paste.

root_cause: Cable issue, switch port failure, NIC driver problem, or interface disabled.
suggested_action: Check cable, switch port, NIC status, and network driver.

prediction_rule: Test case did not complete within expected SLA.
root_cause: Slow hardware response, blocked process, test dependency failure, or resource contention.
suggested_action: Re-run test, check CPU/memory utilization, and validate dependent services.
